title: OptiFast
description: FPS optimization to make it better, lighter and faster!!
body:
## OptiFast
**is a performance-focused modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience. It optimizes game settings and reduces lag, allowing you to enjoy smoother gameplay and higher FPS. With OptiFast, you can explore your world without the frustration of performance issues.**

 
## - **Significantly Increased FPS**

Optimized settings and lightweight mods boost your frames per second, providing a smoother gaming experience.

## - **Reduced Resource Usage** 

The modpack is designed to lighten the load on your system, ensuring Minecraft runs efficiently without unnecessary strain.

## - **Performance-Only Focus** 

OptiFast includes only performance-enhancing mods, avoiding any additions that could slow down your game, ensuring maximum efficiency.

## This is fps on intel celeron laptop

![This is fps on intel celeron laptop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a968018e3b509484e6ebdac89bdbddd48c05580.png)


<details>
<summary>Mod List V1.5.5</summary>

- Bad optimizations
- C2me-fabric
- Cloth config
- Dynamic fps
- Entity culling
- Fabric api
- Ferritecore
- Immediately fast
- Indium
- Lithium
- Memory leak fix
- Modern fix
- Mod menu
- More culling
- Noisium
- Sodium fabric
- Thread tweak
- Threaten gl
- VMP-fabric


</details>


Thank you for downloading this modpack, hopefully it can increase the fps in your Minecraft.
